option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
COOKIE_JAR="/tmp/uniportal_test_cookies.txt" rm -f "$COOKIE_JAR"
echo "=== Step 1: GET /login — capture CSRF ===" LOGIN_HTML=$(curl -s -c "$COOKIE_JAR" "http://localhost:8080/login") CSRF=$(echo "$LOGIN_HTML" | grep -o 'name="_csrf" value="[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*value="//;s/"//') echo "CSRF: $CSRF"
echo "" echo "=== Step 2: POST /login as admin1 ===" curl -s -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" -L \ --data-urlencode "username=admin1" \ --data-urlencode "password=Admin@123" \ --data-urlencode "_csrf=${CSRF}" \ -X POST "http://localhost:8080/login" \ -o /tmp/after_login.html echo "Login done." TITLE=$(grep -o '<title>[^<]*</title>' /tmp/after_login.html 2>/dev/null || true) echo "Page after login: $TITLE"
echo "" echo "=== Step 3: GET /courses — extract fresh CSRF ===" COURSES_HTML=$(curl -s -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" "http://localhost:8080/courses") CSRF2=$(echo "$COURSES_HTML" | grep -o 'name="_csrf" value="[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*value="//;s/"//') echo "CSRF2: $CSRF2"
echo "" echo "=== Step 4: POST /courses/new with EMPTY fields ===" HTTP_CODE=$(curl -s -c "$COOKIE_JAR" -b "$COOKIE_JAR" \ -d "code=&name=&professor=&_csrf=${CSRF2}" \ -X POST "http://localhost:8080/courses/new" \ -w "%{http_code}" \ -o /tmp/validation_response.html 2>/dev/null)
echo "HTTP response code: $HTTP_CODE" echo "" echo "=== Validation error messages found in response ===" grep -o 'Course code is required\|Course name is required\|Professor name is required' /tmp/validation_response.html 2>/dev/null | sort | uniq || echo "(none found - check /tmp/validation_response.html)"
